form.formComment: Finished second last start (25.78) at big odds over 450m at Ballarat. Boxed the fence this time. Must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (25.78) at big odds over 450m at Ballarat. Boxed the fence this time. Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground turning out of back straight.
Checked turning out of front straight and tailed off.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 500m. Last start finished last over 600m at The Meadows beaten 15 lengths (35.58) behind Espoir in a Restricted WIN H on April 8. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids at box rise.

form.formComment: Caught the eye with a sensational early split and setting up a 1.75 lengths win at Ballarat over 545m in 31.18. Has ability and among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Caught the eye with a sensational early split and setting up a 1.75 lengths win at Ballarat over 545m in 31.18. Has ability and among the chances.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Him Tarzan at this track last start over 500m (28.50). Has to be respected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when second behind Him Tarzan at this track last start over 500m (28.50). Has to be respected.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (28.67) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5, finishing a 6 length fourth. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from six starts. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th on April 13 over 595m at Sandown behind Pumping Magic beaten 3.5 lengths (35.36) in a Grade 5 NP. Leading contender.

formComments.comment: Last start finished 6th on April 13 over 595m at Sandown behind Pumping Magic beaten 3.5 lengths (35.36) in a Grade 5 NP. Leading contender.

form.formComment: At the last start finished last over 450m at Ballarat beaten 16 lengths (26.40) behind Reuben Hill in a Grade 5 on April 8. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.comment: At the last start finished last over 450m at Ballarat beaten 16 lengths (26.40) behind Reuben Hill in a Grade 5 on April 8. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fourth (25.68) at Shepparton over 450m. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.
